title: Dashboards
workspaceDiscardDescription: Your unsaved dashboard edits will be lost.
workspaceConflictMessage: This dashboard changed elsewhere. Reload the page to get the latest, then reapply your edits.
workspaceRollbackParseError: Rolled back, but the returned version could not be parsed. Reload the page.
workspaceClipboardUnavailable: Clipboard unavailable here — use Download instead.
workspacePreviewHint: Preview with synthetic data (no device required)
versionHistoryDescription: Publish the current draft as an immutable version, or roll the draft back to a previous one. History is append-only.
versionLabelHint: Optional — e.g. a release name or v1.2.0.
versionPublishConflict: This dashboard changed elsewhere. Reload the page before publishing.
versionRollbackConfirmDescription: This replaces the current draft with that version. The current draft — including saved changes you have not published — will be lost.
widgetDerivedFromParentWithSlot: Derived from the parent context (slot <mono>{{slotName}}</mono>). This widget follows the selected context and any drill-down.
widgetDerivedFromParentNoSlot: Derived from the parent context. This widget follows the selected context and any drill-down.
widgetNoScopeSelected: No scope selected — showing all alarms (tenant-wide).
widgetMaxRowsCommandHint: Recent commands shown in the history before scrolling.
widgetPrecisionTableHint: Decimal places for numeric values (blank = full precision).
widgetFlashOnChangeHint: Briefly highlight a value green when it rises and red when it falls.
widgetCommandSelectDevice: Select a target device to choose a command.
widgetCommandStale: “{{commandName}}” isn’t available on this device. Pick a command below.
widgetCommandNoneDefined: This device’s profile defines no commands. Add a command definition to its device profile.
widgetCommandUnpublishedHint: This profile isn’t published, so these definitions aren’t enforced yet and any command is accepted. Publish it to hold this button to the contract.
widgetCommandDraftOnlyLabel: Authored but not published, so not selectable yet:
widgetCommandDraftOnlyPublishHint_one: Publish the device profile to use it here.
widgetCommandDraftOnlyPublishHint_other: Publish the device profile to use them here.
widgetContextEmptyHint: Add a widget bound to a customer, area, or asset to use as a parent context — then this slot can follow it.
widgetBindsToHint: Root: chosen directly or by a context selector. Scoped: follows a parent context (e.g. a device within the selected building).
widgetStrategyHint: First: auto-follow the parent's first member. Manual: keep a chosen member (a picker offers the parent's members).
widgetSelectionTargetEmptyHint: This dashboard has no slots yet. Bind a widget to a device or anchor first, then this picker can re-point it.
widgetTargetSlotHint: The slot this picker re-points. A scoped slot becomes a member picker; a root slot a context picker.
